title: geranium ibericum subsp. jubatum
intro: Geranium ibericum subsp. jubatum, also known as the Jubatum Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a plant species within the geranium family that is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin health, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's medicinal properties are often harnessed through herbal preparations, including tinctures, essential oils, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its benefits.
